title: Blackspur BB-CH106 Cable Tie Set - White
features: Ideal for use in the home or garden
Set contains 30 self locking cable ties
Supplied in polybag with header card
description: Product Description Blackspur cable tie set is ideal for house, garden and electrician use. This set contain 30 self locking white cable ties. Comes in polybag with header card packaging. Size: 375mm by 4.8mm. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 30x Cable Tie
